name: show_agent_network
description: Open the JourneyOS Agent Network so the traveler can inspect delegation and handoff traces.

name: show_booking_options
description: Open JourneyOS Booking and Checkout so the traveler can review flights, hotels, and payment details.

name: trip_brief_ready
description: Place a finalized spoken trip request into the JourneyOS editable trip brief. Payload field: conversation.

name: trip_plan_created
description: Notify the voice agent that JourneyOS structured and saved the trip brief.
